Omnia Retail Warehouse is open Monday to Friday from 09:00 to 17:30. If you need any further assistance, feel free to ask!

I also noticed you mentioned another issue: "My mouse arrived damaged, I want a refund". Would you like me to help with that now?
My mouse arrived damaged, I want a refund

Thank you for letting us know about the damaged mouse. To assist you with the return and refund process, could you please provide your order ID and the date you received the item? This will help us verify your purchase and proceed accordingly.

Your order ORD-2024-5002 for the Logitech MX Master 3S Mouse was delivered on 2024-05-16, and I see that the refund for the damaged item has already been approved. If you need any further assistance or have other questions, please let me know!
I'm having trouble processing your request. Please contact our support team directly at support@omniaretail.ie or call 01-XXX-XXXX for immediate assistance.
